metadata.title: Sora 2 API
metadata.description: Test and integrate Sora 2 API for text-to-video, image-to-video, audio-aware clips, and Pro storyboard workflows.

title: Sora 2 API
description: Sora 2 is an AI video model focused on realistic motion, stronger physical consistency, and cinematic scene generation. Use it for text-to-video and image-to-video workflows where believable movement, camera logic, and audio matter.
This page follows the Seedance 2.0 API layout: choose a Sora 2 model type, test generation in the playground, inspect request fields, compare pricing, and move into production with the API docs.
pricingNote: USD estimates use $0.005/credit with the best annual plan.

labels.apiDocsDetailDescription: Open the full API documentation for endpoints, authentication, task polling, and payload details.
labels.apiInputDescription: Keep the payload predictable while still allowing rich video, image, audio, and storyboard control.
labels.selectedModelNote: The playground, request sample, request fields, and pricing on this page follow the selected model type.

featuresTitle: What Sora 2 API adds to your video workflow
featuresDescription: Use Sora 2 when your product needs realistic motion, prompt-driven video generation, reference-image control, or higher-end Pro output.

capabilities.title: Realistic text-to-video
capabilities.description: Turn prompts into cinematic clips with more believable camera movement, subject motion, and scene physics.

capabilities.title: Image-to-video control
capabilities.description: Start from a reference image to preserve subject identity, framing, style, and product details across the generated clip.

capabilities.title: Audio-aware output
capabilities.description: Create clips that can include audio-oriented settings where supported, helping ads, shorts, and story scenes feel more complete.

capabilities.title: Pro and storyboard modes
capabilities.description: Use Pro variants for higher-end generation and storyboard mode when you need structured scene planning.

quickStartTitle: From Sora 2 test to production request
quickStartDescription: A compact path for validating prompts, image references, durations, and model variants before integrating the API.

workflows.title: 1. Choose a Sora 2 mode
workflows.description: Select text-to-video, image-to-video, Stable, Pro, or Pro Storyboard based on the output quality and control you need.

workflows.title: 2. Submit generation
workflows.description: Send your API request with a model id, prompt, reference image when needed, duration, resolution, and other model-specific fields.

workflows.title: 3. Poll and publish
workflows.description: Track the async task until it succeeds, then retrieve the generated video URL for your app, campaign, or workflow.

useCasesTitle: What you can create with Sora 2 API
useCasesDescription: Sora 2 works well when a product needs repeatable video generation with a clear creative brief or reference frame.
useCases: Cinematic social videos for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts
Product shots animated from reference images
Ad concepts, launch teasers, and creative variants
Storyboard previews for film, games, and brand campaigns
Batch creative generation for video tools and SaaS apps

communityShowcase.title: Successful Sora 2 generations from the community
communityShowcase.description: Browse public Sora 2 outputs that finished successfully, then open any case to inspect the prompt, settings, and result.

productionNotes.title: Account-gated execution
productionNotes.body: Users sign in, submit jobs, and consume credits through the existing SdanceAI generation flow.

productionNotes.title: Reference image support
productionNotes.body: Use image-to-video models when your workflow needs stronger subject, style, or product continuity.

productionNotes.title: Flexible model choice
productionNotes.body: Switch between standard, Stable, Pro, and Storyboard variants based on speed, quality, and scene-control needs.

faqs.question: What is Sora 2 API best for?
faqs.answer: It is best for realistic short-form AI video generation, especially text-to-video, image-to-video, ads, product visuals, social clips, and storyboard-style concept development.

faqs.question: What Sora 2 model types are available on this page?
faqs.answer: The page includes Sora 2 Text to Video, Sora 2 Image to Video, Stable variants, Sora 2 Pro Text to Video, Sora 2 Pro Image to Video, and Sora 2 Pro Storyboard.

faqs.question: Can I start generation from an image?
faqs.answer: Yes. Select a Sora 2 Image to Video or Pro Image to Video model when you want a reference image to guide subject identity, framing, product details, or visual style.

faqs.question: Where can I test Sora 2 before integrating?
faqs.answer: Use the playground on this page to test prompts, model variants, request fields, pricing, and API payload behavior before wiring it into production.

faqs.question: What is the difference between Sora 2 and Sora 2 Pro?
faqs.answer: Sora 2 is suited for general short-form generation and iteration. Sora 2 Pro is positioned for higher-end output and more demanding creative workflows.

faqs.question: What is Sora 2 Pro Storyboard for?
faqs.answer: Storyboard mode is useful when you need more structured scene planning, creative sequencing, or previsualization before producing final clips.

faqs.question: Does Sora 2 API support audio?
faqs.answer: Supported Sora 2 variants include audio-oriented generation settings. Availability and behavior depend on the selected model and request fields shown on this page.

faqs.question: How long can Sora 2 videos be?
faqs.answer: Available duration choices depend on the selected Sora 2 model and pricing tier. Check the pricing and request fields after choosing a model type.

faqs.question: Can I use Sora 2 API for commercial projects?
faqs.answer: This page is configured for commercial API workflows. For production use, review your account plan, credit balance, model availability, and applicable content policy requirements.

faqs.question: How do I move from playground testing to API integration?
faqs.answer: Choose the model type, inspect the generated request JSON and field table, then open the API docs for endpoint, authentication, task polling, and webhook details.

cta.title: Turn Sora 2 into your video workflow
cta.description: Open the generator, test a Sora 2 prompt or image reference, then use the API docs when you are ready to connect it to production.
